title: Day 31 -  Kanji Practice
html:
Day 31 - Kanji Practice

Please download today's kanji practice here: Kanji Practice Day 31.pdf

Practising writing every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

Refer back to the Week 7 - Kanji lesson to watch how to do the correct stroke order for 時,  分, 半.
